sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Itaú Unibanco Shareholders Strongly Back Governance and Pay at April 28 AGM
feed.summary: Itaú Unibanco shareholders demonstrated strong support for the company's governance and compensation practices at their April 28, 2026, online Annual General Stockholders' Meeting. Key resolutions, including the approval of 2025 financial statements, board elections, and executive compensation, received overwhelming endorsement with approximately 99% approval. This outcome signals investors' broad backing for Itaú Unibanco's current management strategy and governance structure.

feed.title: Barclays (DJP) issues GLD-linked Barrier Notes with 8% capped return (Mature May 2, 2028)
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC is offering $5.23 million in Barrier Market Linked Notes tied to the SPDR® Gold Trust (GLD), maturing on May 2, 2028. These notes offer a conditional return of 8% if a Barrier Event occurs (GLD price exceeds $588.99), otherwise investors participate in positive GLD performance or receive only principal if GLD is flat or negative. The notes are unsecured obligations and subject to Barclays' credit risk and potential U.K. bail-in powers.

feed.title: Generac Holdings Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Generac Holdings Inc. stock saw a gain of 2.92% on a strong trading day, closing at $121.78. This performance outpaced both the S&P 500's daily gain and its competitors within the diversified operations industry, such as Carlisle Cos. Inc. and SPX Technologies Inc.

feed.title: Multiple Insiders Sold Janux Therapeutics Shares Presenting Weak Signs For Investors
feed.summary: Several insiders at Janux Therapeutics (NASDAQ:JANX) have sold shares over the past year, which could be a warning sign for investors. Although insider selling can have various explanations, significant sales from multiple insiders warrant further investigation. While the insiders still hold a fair chunk of the company, the sales and two existing warning signs suggest caution for potential investors.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price beats first quarter profit expectations
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price Group Inc. reported first-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $2.52, surpassing analyst expectations of $2.36. While revenue reached $1.86 billion, slightly below estimates, assets under management decreased to $1.7 trillion, and the firm experienced net client outflows of $13.7 billion. Despite these challenges, the company returned $629 million to stockholders through dividends and share repurchases.

feed.title: DTE Energy misses quarterly profit estimates as energy trading unit swings to loss
feed.summary: DTE Energy missed Wall Street's first-quarter profit estimates due to its energy trading unit swinging to a $25 million loss, despite stronger earnings from its electric utility segment. The company affirmed its full-year operating profit outlook. DTE plans to invest over $6 billion this year to improve its electric and natural gas infrastructure.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource Stock (US12189T1043): Q1 2026 Earnings Beat Expectations with Strong Revenue Growth
feed.summary: Builders FirstSource (NYSE: BLDR) reported strong Q1 2026 results, surpassing analyst estimates with net sales up 8% year-over-year to $4.86 billion and diluted EPS of $1.25. The company demonstrated resilience with an 11% increase in structural products and an expanded gross margin of 30.1%, driven by robust demand in single-family homebuilding. These results highlight the company's strong operational performance and strategic position within the U.S. residential construction sector.

feed.title: Altria Group tops Q1 estimates as higher pricing offsets a volume decline (MO:NYSE)
feed.summary: Altria Group (MO) reported strong first-quarter earnings, with revenue increasing by 3.2% to $5.43 billion and adjusted EPS rising 7.3% to $1.32, surpassing estimates. The positive results were primarily driven by higher pricing within its smokeable products segment, which successfully compensated for a decline in shipment volume. Following the announcement, Altria Group's stock saw a slight increase in early trading.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange Approves Second Quarter Dividend of $0.52 per Share
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE) announced a second-quarter dividend of $0.52 per share, an 8% increase from the previous year. This cash dividend is payable on June 30, 2026, to stockholders of record as of June 15, 2026, with an ex-dividend date also on June 15, 2026. The company is a leading provider of financial market technology and data, operating various financial exchanges, including the New York Stock Exchange.

feed.title: Quanta Services Reports Record Q1 Results, Raises 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: Quanta Services announced record first-quarter 2026 results, with significant increases in revenue, net income, and backlog. The company also substantially raised its full-year 2026 financial outlook, driven by strong demand and project execution in the utility, generation, and large-load markets. An analyst rating for PWR stock remains a Buy with a $733.00 price target, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst indicates an "Outperform" rating due to strong fundamentals and outlook.

feed.title: Broadridge Financial Stock (US1143401024): Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.42 Per Share
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.42 per share, payable on July 7, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 19, 2026. This marks the company's 23rd consecutive annual dividend increase, reflecting its strong financial performance and commitment to shareholder returns. The article details Broadridge's business model, its significance to U.S. investors, and potential risks.

feed.title: Fortive used $500M on buybacks as first-quarter revenue hit $1.07B
feed.summary: Fortive (NYSE: FTV) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with $1.07 billion in revenue, up 7.7% year-over-year, and adjusted diluted net EPS of $0.70, a 25.4% increase. The company repurchased approximately $500 million of shares in Q1 and reaffirmed its full-year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $2.90 to $3.00, trending towards the upper half of the range. These results highlight solid execution, underlying demand for products, and progress on its "Fortive Accelerated" strategy.

feed.title: Quanta Services Inc. Stock (US74762E1029): Q4 Revenue Beats Estimates at $7.84B
authors: AD HOC NEWS Editorial Team – Equity Coverage.
feed.summary: Quanta Services Inc. (NYSE: PWR) reported strong Q4 CY2025 results, with revenue of $7.84 billion surpassing analyst estimates by 6.4% and adjusted EPS of $3.16 beating expectations. The company also raised its full-year 2026 guidance above consensus, driven by significant backlog growth of $43.98 billion. These results highlight Quanta's strong position in the growing infrastructure services market, particularly in electric power and renewable energy sectors, benefiting from increased US infrastructure spending.

feed.title: Milder weather trimmed utility demand, but Southern still earned $1.4B
feed.summary: Southern Company reported Q1 2026 net income of $1.4 billion ($1.21 per share) and $1.5 billion ($1.32 per share) excluding items, with operating revenues up 8.0% to $8.4 billion. While higher utility revenues contributed positively, milder-than-normal weather and increased interest expense partially offset these gains. The company is focused on infrastructure investments to support regional growth and maintain reliability, despite short-term fluctuations observed after recent positive corporate news.

feed.title: JLL posts record Q1 EPS as leasing, capital markets jump
feed.summary: Jones Lang LaSalle (JLL) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with diluted EPS rising 192% to $3.33 and revenue increasing 11% to $6.39 billion. This performance was driven by significant growth in Leasing Advisory, up 16% in local currency, and Capital Markets Services, up 21% in local currency. The company also repurchased $300 million of shares during the quarter, indicating confidence in its financial health despite negative free cash flow.

feed.title: Sempra Energy (SRE) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Thursday

The company last reported Q4 earnings of $1.28 per share, exceeding consensus estimates. Analysts currently project Sempra Energy to achieve $5 EPS for both the current and next fiscal years.

feed.title: Energy savings could power 475,000 homes for a year, PSE&G says
feed.summary: PSE&G's energy efficiency programs have helped nearly 500,000 customers and 22,000 businesses save approximately $960 million annually and receive $1.4 billion in rebates since October 2020. These initiatives have led to significant electric and gas savings, preventing over 2.4 million metric tons of CO2 emissions annually, which is enough to power 475,000 homes for a year. The programs have also supported over 9,300 clean energy careers and fostered local economic activity across New Jersey.

feed.title: Amex Gold Credit Card Gets More Travel Rewards at the Same $325 Annual Fee
feed.summary: American Express has enhanced its Gold Card's travel rewards, offering five times the membership rewards on prepaid hotel bookings through its travel services, up from two times. Cardholders will also receive complimentary "Five Star" status at Hertz. These changes aim to meet the growing demand for travel-linked perks from Gen Z and millennial consumers, while keeping the annual fee at $325.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange Reports Record First Quarter 2026
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) announced record first-quarter 2026 results, with net revenues of $3.0 billion and diluted EPS of $2.48, driven by its diversified platform across exchanges, fixed income, and mortgage technology. The company returned $848 million to stockholders through share repurchases and dividends, while also providing updated financial guidance for the second quarter and full year 2026. The consistent performance highlights ICE's robust business model and ongoing commitment to shareholder value.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. Class C Stock (US02079K1079): Q1 2026 Earnings Beat Expectations with 22% Revenue Grow
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with revenue soaring 22% year-over-year to $109.9 billion and EPS reaching $5.11, significantly surpassing analyst expectations. The company, primarily driven by Google Search and YouTube advertising, also announced its first dividend, payable on June 15, 2026, indicating confidence in its financial performance and shareholder returns. While maintaining leadership in digital advertising and cloud computing, Alphabet faces ongoing regulatory scrutiny and intense competition in AI and autonomous driving sectors.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Earnings Preview: Short-Term Setbacks Won’t Change Long-Term Upside, Wall Street Collectively Raises Target Prices.
feed.summary: ExxonMobil's Q1 2026 earnings are expected to show a significant year-over-year decline in EPS despite a rise in revenue, primarily due to derivative losses and asset impairments in its downstream segment, coupled with a production decrease. However, upstream profits benefited from higher oil prices, and Wall Street analysts are raising price targets, anticipating a strong Q2 rebound and focusing on the company's core upstream profitability. The market views Q1 losses as temporary accounting issues, with confidence in ExxonMobil's long-term outlook.

feed.title: Keybank National Association OH Grows Position in PayPal Holdings, Inc. $PYPL

feed.title: Hershey sales up on pricing as “elasticity” eats into volumes
feed.summary: Hershey reported a 10.6% increase in net sales to $3.1bn for the first quarter, driven by pricing strategies and the acquisition of LesserEvil. Despite the sales boost, the company experienced a decline in volumes by approximately two points due to "elasticity impacts" in its North America Confectionery and International segments. Hershey maintained its financial forecasts for 2026, anticipating net sales to rise 4-5% and adjusted EPS to increase by 30-35%.

feed.title: A Look At McKesson (MCK) Valuation After William Blair’s New Outperform Rating
feed.summary: William Blair has initiated coverage on McKesson (MCK) with an Outperform rating, highlighting confidence in the company's role in the U.S. drug distribution industry, following a recent dividend declaration of $0.82 per share. Despite a 4% decline in share price over the past month, McKesson has shown strong long-term shareholder returns. The article suggests McKesson is undervalued with a fair value pegged around $990.87, contrasting with its current trading price of $822.63, although potential risks from drug pricing policies and vertical integration are noted.
